description: new-stream dispatch — branch created locally, brief.md written, STOP emitted; current workstream not advanced.
owning_behavior: MODES new-stream dispatch (R-MW-4, D28, G1 local-only)
dispatch_arg: new-stream analytics-pipeline "Add analytics pipeline to ADP"
expected_result: branch feature/analytics-pipeline created locally; _streams/analytics-pipeline/brief.md written; STOP
load_bearing_assertion: new-stream dispatch: branch created off HEAD (local, no push); brief.md written with ask/branch/status=pending/date; 'New workstream queued on branch feature/analytics-pipeline. Check out that branch in a new harness session.' emitted; STOP. STEP 0 sub-steps NOT run. Current workstream not advanced.
separates_from_defect_by: new-stream-auto-push defect pushes branch to remote (violates G1). Golden: branch local-only, no remote push.
stop_message_template: New workstream queued on branch `feature/analytics-pipeline`. Check out that branch in a new harness session.
